particulars.description: Land at 9 and 10 short hill and 54 and 56 high. Pavement, nottingham registered at land registry with title numbers NT317818, NT112266, NT317819, NT333709, NT243582, NT104201 and NT280866. For more details please refer to the charge instrument.
